destinations.evidence: The validator enforces executor/TTL bounds, prompt/model non-emptiness, ECIES/user-key formats, supported type allowlist 0/4/5/6, and Phase 2 offset bounds.
The codec exposes the fields that validation gates: max_poll_block, type, prompt, and model.
destinations.snippet:
pub enum SovereignAgentType { ClaudeCode = 0, Codex = 1, Aider = 2, Mcp = 3, OpenClaw = 4, Crush = 5, ZeroClaw = 6 }
...
max_poll_block: u64_token(&tokens[4], "max_poll_block")?,
sovereign_agent_type: u16_token(&tokens[11], "sovereign_agent_type")?.try_into()?,
prompt: string_token(&tokens[12], "prompt")?,
model: string_token(&tokens[18], "model")?,

equivalence_argument: The accepted sovereign-agent type variants are exactly 0, 4, 5, and 6, and validate_phase2_deadline_offset rejects offsets <= ttl and offsets above the canonical 70,000 cap.
notes: The three neighboring sovereign-agent invariants share the same validation evidence and differ only in emphasis.
rationale: The commit summary lists seven new Sovereign Agent checks, and the implementation adds concrete error variants and validation for model, cliType allowlist, ECIES/user key formats, and Phase 2 offset bounds. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: Sovereign Agent 0x080C payload validation must require a nonempty prompt and model, supported cliType limited to 0, 4, 5, or 6, valid ECIES encrypted_secrets, valid optional user_public_key, nonzero executor, TTL within bounds, max_poll_block offset greater than ttl, and max_poll_block offset no greater than 70,000.
suggested_falsification_tests: Submit Sovereign Agent payloads varying one field at a time: empty prompt, empty model, cliType 1/2/3/7, invalid ECIES blob, invalid user_public_key, max_poll_block equal to ttl, max_poll_block greater than 70,000, and valid controls. Assert only the valid control passes and each invalid case maps to the corresponding structured AsyncValidationError.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Build sovereign-agent payloads with unsupported types, empty model or prompt, invalid ECIES/user key, max_poll_block <= ttl, max_poll_block > 70_000, and valid boundary controls; assert only valid controls pass.
title: Sovereign Agent payloads have explicit RPC constraints
